final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar/profile picture for a content creator account.

Style/medium: needs a modern, universally appealing aesthetic suitable for both Chinese and international social platforms — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a balanced, centered composition that works at small thumbnail sizes — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic elements representing new energy vehicles, digital tech, and lifestyle products (three themes merged harmoniously)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a neutral-to-warm direction that avoids culturally sensitive colors — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs clean, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must avoid culturally or religiously sensitive symbols, must maintain visual harmony across diverse audiences, must be legible at small avatar sizes
Avoid: must avoid specific religious iconography, political symbols, culturally charged colors or shapes, overly region-specific design elements that may not translate globally
